data.title: 国际服例行维护47（延长）
data.summary: [9/26 Scheduled Maintenance Notice] Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 9/26 (T
data.body:
[9/26 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 9/26 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 9/26 (Tue) 2:00 – 9:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2285403

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.
#BlueArchive

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

9/26 (Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 12:00 PM (UTC).

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

#BlueArchive

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

9/26 (Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 1:00 PM (UTC).

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

#BlueArchive
